content: Analyze AAPL revenue, margins, valuation risks, and the key catalysts to watch.

args.query: Apple (AAPL): analyze revenue trend, gross margin and operating margin, net income margin; provide latest annual and quarterly revenue/margin figures and recent changes; include valuation metrics (P/E, forward P/E, EV/EBITDA, price-to-sales) and any analyst estimates/price targets if available; identify key valuation risks based on fundamentals (growth slowdown, margin compression, services vs iPhone mix, buybacks, guidance, China/export/regulatory).

- P/E: — | EPS: —
- Revenue Growth: — | Earnings Growth: —
- Gross Margin: 47.2% | Op Margin: 33.0% | Net Margin: 27.7%
- D/E: 1.16

args.query: AAPL valuation metrics (current price, market cap, trailing P/E, forward P/E, EV/EBITDA, P/S) and latest quarterly/annual estimates/price targets plus latest earnings/news headlines that could be near-term catalysts.
